facility: University of Maryland Medical Center — Vascular Lab
indication: Evaluate for deep vein thrombosis as the source of pulmonary embolism.
technique: Grayscale, color, and spectral Doppler of the right lower extremity deep and superficial venous system.
findings: Non-compressible, echogenic thrombus with absent flow involving the RIGHT proximal/common femoral vein, the posterior tibial veins, and the greater saphenous vein. Extensive clot burden. The left lower extremity was not the focus of this study.
impression: Acute extensive RIGHT lower extremity deep vein thrombosis (proximal femoral, posterior tibial) plus superficial (greater saphenous) involvement. Source for the pulmonary embolism.
